text.title: Tool Use — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: support agent with `lookup_customer` (read-only), `send_email` (mutating), `delete_account` (destructive, human-gated).

example.title: tools.yaml for support agent
example.note: Demonstrates r1 (typed schemas), r3 (safety class per tool), r4 (destructive gated). Pattern matched in dispatcher to refuse unauthorised classes.
